headline: 2026 Robotics Update: The Physical AI Ecosystem
summary: Robotics is now a mass-scale industry driven by convergence of advanced software, specialized hardware, and reshoring capital flows. Here we take a closer look at recent industry data.

headline: Teradyne: World‑Class AI Franchise, But Priced For Perfection
summary: Teradyne rides AI chip test demand with record Q1 growth, but valuation is rich and Q2 may normalize. Click for more on TER stock.
